_index.baseline: pre-unification oracle numbers (06-12, post-P13 Jacobi fix) - NEVER delete
_index.harness: REPL snippet to reproduce the baseline
_index.U2_gate: post-unification F1 CUDA gate: mf path via MatrixFreeHierarchy == reference
_index.U3_gate: post-deletion/consolidation gate: same numbers as U2, lower CPU test count (spike tests removed)
_index.U4_gate: new tests T1/T2/T3 added; both files pass with CUDA functional
_index.U4_accept: F1 static replay with CASE-FILE settings (ml3/mc124/pre3post3/F32coarse/F64sys); mf==ref

U4_accept.settings: Cg+Geometric(ml3) AMGJacobi pre3/post3 mc124 F32coarse F64sys rtol1e-3
U4_accept.note: user edited case AMG_setup (was ml2/mc4096); re-run with new settings, mf==ref iters+trueres, both converge

U4_gate.note: T1 asserts solver-reported convergence (true F32 residual floors at eps_f32*cond ~4e-3, not a bug). T3 needs strictly diag-dominant matrix (pure graph-Laplacian diverges under omega=4/3 Jacobi+Geometric).

U3_gate.note: via compare_amg_paths (now in 10_AMG_validation.jl); precompile clean after device/ deleted

U2_gate.note: both converged, mf_routed via MatrixFreeHierarchy (ws.hierarchy isa MatrixFreeHierarchy)==true; matches baseline 45/45 + 31/31

harness.setup: Pkg.activate(repo); Pkg.add("CUDA") LOCAL ONLY; using XCALibre,CUDA,Adapt,Serialization,SparseArrays,LinearAlgebra; S=XCALibre.Solve; e=open(deserialize,"/home/humberto/casesXCALibre/F1-fetchCFD_Minimal/f1_pressure_systems.bin")[1]
harness.device_A: I,J,V=findnz(parent(e.A)); A=XCALibre.ModelFramework._build_A(CUDABackend(),I,J,V,n); b=adapt(bk,e.b); F32: cast V and b
harness.percycle: h=S.build_matrix_free_hierarchy(S._amg_matrix(e.A),2,bk;max_coarse=4096); CUDA.@elapsed 20x S.matrix_free_cycle!(h.st,rhs) (U2: mf path = S._workspace with fuse_levels>=1)
